title: Finance Report
description: Key design elements for finance reports, quarterly reviews, P&L summaries, budget variance, and MRR reviews.

question_templates.question: 报告对象是什么：公司、部门、项目、活动、产品线，还是客户账户？
时间范围是什么：月度、季度、年度，还是自定义周期？
核心财务指标有哪些：收入、成本、利润、现金流、预算偏差、MRR、ARR？
读者是谁：老板、财务团队、投资人、业务负责人，还是客户？

defaults.primary_user: finance lead or executive reviewing business performance
defaults.decision_goal: explain financial performance, highlight risks, and identify actions for the next period
defaults.visual_direction: executive report with crisp tables, variance highlights, restrained charts, and narrative callouts
